mano_cua.result_summary: 时间线网格响应式重渲染正常：从400px到1280px范围多次改变窗口大小，时间线容器宽度都正确跟随视口变化重新渲染。1280→1200→1024→980→700→500→1280px各尺寸下网格保持完整24小时视图。发现items-inner在800px时宽度异常(17px)等视觉问题，但核心重渲染功能正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Timeline grid responsive re-rendering works correctly across all tested viewport widths. Container div width consistently matched viewport width after each resize.
